title: Programmer Art x Fresh Animations (Fresh Programmer Animations)
description: Makes Programmer Art compatible with Fresh Animations! (With Extension Pack Support!)
body:
**Description** Programmer Art x Fresh Animations (Fresh Programmer Animations) is an addon resource pack that makes Programmer Art compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) (duh). It also comes with an extension pack that supports [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) and includes additional content of its own! (Refer to the bottom of this page to see the intended order of active resource packs) **Info** This pack does not aim to retexture mobs introduced in newer versions of the game to match the Programmer Art aesthetic, except in cases where those mobs are directly related to or derived from entities that existed earlier than 1.14.X (Such as Villagers and Illagers). Instead, the purpose of this resource pack is to modify/edit the textures of entities from Programmer Art so that they are fully compatible with Fresh Animations and can be animated correctly. **Content Overview (The Extension Pack contains most of the new content)** General (Base Pack) - Fully retextured Villagers. See the changelog for a complete overview of the changes. - Classic bats are back! Special Renamed Variants (Extension Pack) - Rename a creeper to "Aww man" or "Creeper?! Aww man" to obtain the variants with red eyes inspired by "Revenge" by CaptainSparklez. Each has a 1% natural spawn chance. - Rename a pig to "Legend" to obtain the TechnoThePig variant. Equip it with a saddle to add a cape. Technoblade Never Dies! - Rename a pink sheep to "Pink Sheep" to obtain the variant inpired by ExplodingTNT's Pink Sheep character. - Rename a pink sheep to "Mr. Pink Sheep" to add the iconic thug life sunglasses to the variant above. - Rename a purple sheep to "Purple Shep" to obtain the variant inpired by ExplodingTNT's Purple Shep character. - Rename a slime to "Slamaslime" to obtain Slamacow's slime variant. It has a 2% natural spawn chance. Pigmen (Extension Pack) - Classic Pigmen have been fully restored. - Pigmen have a 50% chance to use zombified piglin animations and a 50% chance to use zombie animations, preserving the classic appearance. - Pigmen have a 50% chance to spawn with a snout. - Pigmen wielding golden axes use a custom texture based on piglin brutes (Minecraft 1.21.5+ only, as there is an issue with NBT tags in previous versions). - Rename any pigman to "Legend" to give it a crown. Additional Mob Variety (Extension Pack) - Chickens, cows, pigs, and sheep have a 50% chance to spawn without ears or tails. These variants add visual diversity while maintaining a more vanilla-friendly appearance. - Sheep in the Extension Pack feature dyed wool undercoats even in versions before 1.21.5, while sheep in the base pack do not have dyed wool on their heads (the undercoat part) even in versions after 1.21.5, to preserve the classic look. Their bodies do still have dyed undercoats though! > _Known Issues: None!_
Reverie Projects Discord Consider joining the Reverie Projects Discord (formerly known as Nostalgica Reverie) for sneak peeks, updates, and discussions surrounding our projects. It is the best place to stay up to date with nostalgia-focused creations such as Nostalgic Tweaks, Re-Console, Moderner Beta, PACP, and more. One of our goals is to preserve the spirit of early Minecraft while fostering a community of people who share the same passion. Whether you are looking for support, interested in discussing our projects, or have questions about programming and resource pack development, you will find all of that and more over at our place! [Click here to join the Reverie Projects Discord!](https://discord.gg/RenzDjqQyB) Do you think your project is a good fit for the Reverie Projects ecosystem? Feel free to submit an application! For further information, don’t hesitate to contact a member of our team. You are welcome to talk and collaborate with us!
Villagers & Zombie Villagers CLOSE-UP ![Villagers & Zombie Villagers (See changelog for more info)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30f9e65a09ca3c0a91ad39cddccdb1bbba2832fc.png)
PROPER RESOURCE PACK ORDER ![Proper Resource Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c739128fdc9ed0bdbe79bb879a78f66abb7ede57.png)
Special Thanks - [Kizzycocoa](https://kizzycocoa.com/GameDev/index.php): For providing and allowing the use of the base models for classic bats and classic pigmen, as well as clearing up some uncertainties regarding nbt tags. (HUGE thanks! These additions would not be possible without their help!) - [GillsBills](https://modrinth.com/user/GillsBills): For helping me understand how to make a renamed entity use it's own custom model, instead of being bound to the default one. This allowed for just the renamed variants of the same mob to be animated. - [MidniteDemolisher](https://www.curseforge.com/members/midnitedemolisher/projects): For helping me understand how to make a renamed entity use it's own custom texture when it also uses it's own custom model. This allowed for the renamed variants of the same mob that are animated to have a specific texture, bound to the custom model.

Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge or Modrinth page. - The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets. _______________________________________________ With this resource pack, YOU MAY: - ✅ Modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly. - ✅ Include this resource pack in your mod pack or server. - ✅ Use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts. - ✅ Use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available. _______________________________________________ With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT: - ❌ Redistribute this resource pack. - ❌ Port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition. - ❌ Include unedited assets, unless you have permission from the creator. - ❌ Include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator. _______________________________________________
